title: Granta cuts ties with Commonwealth prize after AI row involving Maltese writer
description: Maltese writer John Edward DeMicoli, whose story The Bastion’s Shadow won the Canada and Europe category of the 2026 prize.

title: SZA Slams Suno for Using Her Music To Train Its AI Models: ‘Nothing You Could Ever Say to Me To Make This Okay’
description: SZA takes to Instagram to call out Suno for utilizing her released and unreleased music in order to train its AI models. The post SZA Slams Suno for Using Her Music To Train Its AI Models: ‘Nothing You Could Ever Say to Me To Make This Okay’ appeared first on VICE .

title: Students must embrace education, reskilling and AI, says AICTE officer
description: AICTE Chief Coordinating Officer Dr Buddha Chandrashekhar urged students to focus on education, skilling and emerging technologies, highlighting opportunities in logistics and cyber security. Speakers at a Deeptech boot camp also stressed the importance of learning to work with AI

title: China tests AI tools to extend heart care as doctor shortages bite worldwide
description: For many cardiac patients, risk does not end with surgery. It follows them home after discharge, when follow-up can be delayed and warning signs may be missed.

title: Morgan Stanley gives Google stock investors reason to rethink AI spending
description: Morgan Stanley says Google stock investors may need to rethink Alphabet’s AI spending as cloud demand and monetization potential come into sharper focus
